classification.ex: The scientific classification of birds is very complex.

classified.def: 分類的、機密的、分類的人的人 (或物)
classified.ex: The report contains highly top secret classified information.

classifier.def: 分類器、(語)量詞人物 (單數)
classifier.ex: Chinese uses various numeric classifiers for several nouns.

classify.def: 分類、分級、歸類的人的人
classify.ex: It's difficult to classify this strange animal correctly.

classless.ex: The politician promised to build a truly classless society.

classmate.ex: I met my old classmate for a coffee in the town today.

classroom.def: 教室、課堂的人的人物 (單數)
classroom.ex: The local classroom was full of excited young students.

classy.def: 上等的、優雅的人人物 (雅)
classy.ex: They stayed in a very classy hotel in central London today.

clatter.def: 叮噹聲、嘈雜聲的人物 (單數)
clatter.ex: The clatter of plates came from the busy hotel kitchen.

clattering.def: 叮噹響的、發曹雜聲的人 (或物)
clattering.ex: The clattering dishes woke up the sleeping baby tonight.

clausal.def: 子句的、條款的人的人物
clausal.ex: The student examined the complex clausal structure clearly.

clause.def: 子句、條款、款項的人物 (單數)
clause.col: relative clause, penalty clause, main clause
clause.ex: The hidden penalty clause in the contract was unfair.

clavichord.ex: The antique clavichord produced a very soft and sweet sound.

clavicle.ex: He suffered a broken clavicle during the rugby match today.

claw.col: cat's claw, claw back, sharp claw
claw.ex: The cat used its sharp claws to climb up the wooden fence.

clawing.def: 抓、搔、正在奪回的人 (或物)
clawing.ex: I heard the cat clawing at the door during the night.

clay.def: 黏土、泥土、肉體的人物 (單數)
clay.col: clay pigeon, clay court, modeling clay
clay.ex: The children used modeling clay to make small animals.

clayey.def: 黏土的、似泥的人的人物
clayey.ex: Growing vegetables is difficult in this heavy and clayey soil.

claymore.def: 蘇格蘭雙手大劍的人物 (單數)
claymore.ex: The ancient claymore was used by Scottish clans in wars.

clean.def: 乾淨的、純潔的人的人物
clean.col: clean up, come clean, clean sheet, keep clean
clean.ex: You must keep your bedroom clean and tidy at all times.

cleaned.def: 洗淨了的、已清理的人的人 (或物)
cleaned.ex: He carefully cleaned the surface of the old painting.

cleaner.def: 清潔工、清潔劑人物 (單數)
cleaner.col: vacuum cleaner, dry cleaner, window cleaner
cleaner.ex: I need a more powerful vacuum cleaner for the carpets.

cleaning.def: 打掃、清潔、清除的人 (或物)
cleaning.col: house cleaning, spring cleaning, dry cleaning
cleaning.ex: They decided to do their annual spring cleaning early.

cleanly.ex: The sharp knife cut cleanly through the thick red meat.

cleanness.ex: The perfect cleanness of the hotel room was impressive.

clean-shaven.def: 鬍鬚刮得乾淨的人的人的人物
clean-shaven.ex: He is always clean-shaven and neat when he goes to work.
